name: Caramel Spice Apple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and cut them into pieces.
2. Combine the apple pieces with water in a large covered saucepot.
3. Cook until the apples are soft, about 30 minutes.
4. Press the mixture through a food mill to obtain 12 cups of apple pulp.
5. Return the apple pulp to the saucepot.
6. Heat 2 cups of sugar in a saucepan and stir until it melts and turns rich golden brown.
7. Carefully pour the hot sugar into the apple pulp.
8. Add the remaining 2 cups of sugar and spices to the mixture.
9. Cook, uncovered, about 1 hour or until the apple butter thickens, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
10. Stir in the lemon juice.
11. Pour the hot apple butter into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space.
12. Adjust lids and process for 10 minutes in a boiling water bath.
Yield: 6 half pints.
